# Aether Applied

> Qorina is decision software for buildings, grids, and fleets. Act when safe, wait when unsure, call a human when needed.

## About

Aether Applied is a Helsinki-based deep tech company building Qorina: calibrated decision software for physical systems. Qorina helps operators automate safely by knowing when not to act.

- Home: https://aetherapplied.com/
